Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0B09 "FROSTBYTE-8000-0B09" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $8000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Frost Byte.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $8000 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
Before starting the game, the routine sets $23BD to $FF to default to joystick control.
